name: Thibaut Courtois
bio: The wall between the posts. Courtois is arguably the best goalkeeper in the world — his 2018 World Cup Golden Glove and 2022 UCL Final heroics prove it.

name: Andriy Lunin
bio: The Ukrainian stopper who proved his worth when Courtois was injured. Cool under pressure and a future number one in the making.

name: Trent Alexander-Arnold
bio: One of the most technically gifted fullbacks ever. His passing range and vision from right back are completely unique in world football.

name: Éder Militão
bio: Explosive, powerful and relentless. Militão is the defensive rock at the heart of Madrid's backline — pace to burn and a warrior's mentality.

name: Antonio Rüdiger
bio: Fearless. Ferocious. Rüdiger brings an intensity to Real Madrid's defence that strikers genuinely fear. A commanding presence every single game.

name: Dean Huijsen
bio: The future of Madrid's defence. Tall, composed and technically gifted, Huijsen is one of Europe's most exciting young centre backs.

name: Raúl Asencio
bio: A homegrown talent breaking through at the highest level. Asencio has shown maturity and composure far beyond his years in a Real Madrid shirt.

name: Álvaro Carreras
bio: An energetic left back with an engine that never stops. Carreras brings dynamism and creativity going forward — a modern fullback through and through.

name: Fran García
bio: A reliable and hardworking left back who gives everything for the badge. García is a dependable option who never lets the team down.

name: Ferland Mendy
bio: Rapid and defensively solid, Mendy is one of the quickest fullbacks in Europe. When fit, he is one of the first names on the teamsheet.

name: Marc Cucurella
bio: Tenacious and tireless, Cucurella brings fight and versatility to the backline. His determination and work rate make him a valuable squad option.

name: Jude Bellingham
bio: The new Galáctico. Bellingham arrived and immediately became one of the best players in the world — goals, assists, leadership. He is the future of this club.

name: Federico Valverde
bio: The engine of Real Madrid's midfield. Valverde covers every blade of grass, wins every duel and still has the quality to decide big games.

name: Aurélien Tchouaméni
bio: The shield in front of the defence. Tchouaméni reads the game beautifully, breaks up play and recycles possession with the composure of a veteran.

name: Eduardo Camavinga
bio: Explosive, dynamic and technically brilliant. Camavinga is one of the most exciting midfielders in Europe — still only getting started at the highest level.

name: Arda Güler
bio: The Turkish gem. Güler has a left foot that produces pure magic — his curling strikes and creative brilliance make him one of the most exciting young players alive.

name: Brahim Díaz
bio: Tricky, electric and always threatening. Brahim is the kind of player who can unlock any defence with a single moment of individual brilliance.

name: Vinícius Júnior
bio: The most terrifying winger on the planet. Vini Jr is unplayable on his day — electric pace, dazzling skill, and a big-game mentality that defines Real Madrid.

name: Kylian Mbappé
bio: The fastest player in the world in a Real Madrid shirt. Mbappé is a generational talent — a World Cup winner with pace, power and lethal finishing.

name: Rodrygo Goes
bio: Mr. Champions League. Rodrygo has a habit of scoring in the biggest moments — his late goals have sent Real Madrid through in Europe time and time again.

name: Endrick
bio: A teenager with the mentality of a champion. Endrick is Brazil's next superstar — powerful, fearless and already showing flashes of something truly special.

name: Gonzalo García
bio: A homegrown striker making his mark in the first team. Clinical in front of goal and hungry to prove himself at the very highest level.

name: Franco Mastantuono
bio: The Argentine wonderkid. Mastantuono arrived at Madrid as one of the most coveted teenagers in the world — creative, skilful and destined for greatness.
